title: Supply Chain Manager - Porter - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Porter - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Porter. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About Porter:
Porter is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Porter!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
